description: Gammy Chan discusses his background in crypto, starting from mining Bitcoin in 2011 during college. He shares his experiences and challenges faced as a broke college student, including selling mined crypto for basic needs. He highlights his success during the 2017 Bull Run when he was able to invest more seriously in crypto.
topic_summary: Gammy Chan's journey in cryptocurrency from mining Bitcoin in college to achieving success during the 2017 Bull Run [t=124.98].
